ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A regular expression for headings of sections to pull to the side column
ast.target: 用于将章节标题拉到侧边栏的正则表达式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: More options are available using the style settings plugin.
ast.target: 使用样式设置插件可以获得更多选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If on, fractions will appear like e.g. "½ cup". If off, they will appear like e.g. "1/2 cup".
ast.target: 如果开启，分数将显示为例如“½ 杯”。如果关闭，将显示为例如“1/2 杯”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Recipe cards shown wider than this view will switch to two-column layout.
ast.target: 宽度超过此视图的食谱卡片将切换为双栏布局。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Treat level one heading as filename
ast.target: 将一级标题视为文件名

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Render fractions in quantities as unicode
ast.target: 将数量中的分数渲染为 Unicode 字符

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Maximum pixel width for single-column view
ast.target: 单栏视图的最大像素宽度

ast.name: name
ast.source: Toggle between recipe card and markdown
ast.target: 在食谱卡片和 Markdown 之间切换
